## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant Main
    participant SparkContext
    participant SQLContext
    participant PostgreSQL
    participant S3
    
    User->>Main: Execute script with args
    Main->>Main: Parse DB credentials
    Main->>SparkContext: Initialize on YARN
    Main->>SparkContext: Set Spark config
    Main->>SQLContext: Create SQLContext
    Main->>SQLContext: Read JDBC format
    SQLContext->>PostgreSQL: Connect and query public.eta_head
    PostgreSQL-->>SQLContext: Return DataFrame
    Main->>Main: Check partition_key
    alt partition_key exists
        Main->>S3: Write partitioned parquet
        Main->>Main: Get latest path
        Main->>S3: Write partitioned to latest
    else no partition_key
        Main->>S3: Write parquet overwrite
        Main->>Main: Get latest path
        Main->>S3: Write to latest overwrite
    end
```
